texto: A third [virtue] is the Justice to insist on private property honestly acquired. Butit is also the justice to pay willingly for good work, to honor labor, to break down privilege, to value people for what they can do rather than for who they are, to view success without envy, making capitalism work since 1776.
explicacao: Citação de Deidre N sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “A third [virtue] is the Justice to insist on private property honestly acquired. Butit is also th…” articula sucesso, burgeoisie, capitalism em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e capitalism.
